articles.summary: Ads get ignored on social media but not in TLDR! Reach developers, PMs, marketers, founders and other tech leaders where they actually

articles.title: pay attention. Learn more about sponsorship opportunities.
CONTENT MARKETING IS GETTING TECHNICAL. THAT'S NOT THE PROBLEM
articles.summary: Content marketing is being rebuilt as a set of systems rather than manual workflows. Blogs move to static infrastructure so they can be updated like code. Customer conversations feed real language into content strategy. Automated audits combine rankings, backlinks, technical health, and AI visibility into prioritized fixes. A central dashboard ties everything together while humans focus on direction and review. The technical layer is not the problem since most of it is already feasible. The constraint is knowing what to build and why, and applying proper strategy and judgment so the system produces useful output.

articles.title: FOR WORKING PARENTS, THE BOUNDARY BETWEEN WORK AND FAMILY IS OFTEN BLURRED
articles.summary: For most full-time US parents, work and family blur together. 70% handle parenting tasks while working, 59% do work tasks around their kids, and 54% say balance is difficult. Flexibility is scarce. 71% want it, but only 25% have real control, and just 6% have onsite childcare. Remote work helps with logistics, but not balance. 65% can't work from home at all, and those who do are just as likely to struggle, even as overlap increases.

articles.title: WIN REPORT: HOW A HOMEPAGE REDESIGN WON BY 25%
articles.summary: A homepage redesign increased transactions by 25% by making the brand's core differentiator clear and reducing navigation friction. Research showed customers cared deeply about product safety and non-toxic materials, but many abandoned the site because it looked cluttered, outdated, and difficult to navigate. The winning version led with a message that challenged standard safety claims, highlighted 35 years of product testing, and surfaced trust signals such as expert advice and MCS safe products. It also replaced overwhelming navigation with clear category paths and action-focused CTAs, which made it easier for visitors to find relevant products and move toward purchase.

articles.title: RYAN LAW'S HUMAN-CENTRIC AI WRITING PROCESS (5 MINUTE VIDEO)
articles.summary: A walkthrough of how Ryan Law goes from keyword idea to published article in 91 minutes. The workflow starts by pulling keyword data to validate which topics are trending using search volume and growth signals. That data is used to build a structured outline. He then talks through each section in rough form while the AI expands it into full paragraphs with examples and references. A stored writing guide keeps tone consistent and refines output through feedback loops. The system then formats content, adds internal links, generates charts, and publishes to WordPress.

articles.title: GOOGLE AI IS CHANGING HOW CONTENT IS DISCOVERED
articles.summary: Pages no longer need top 10 rankings to appear in AI answers, so freshness signals are key. Adding explicit dates like “June 2026” in titles helps signal relevance. LinkedIn profiles are now a major source of AI citations, especially individual posts that use bullets and clear structure. Email is also being filtered through AI tools before users see it. This makes live HTML text essential since AI can miss or ignore text embedded in images.

articles.title: WHO IS YOUR WEBSITE REALLY FOR?
articles.summary: If AI handles discovery and research for buyers, your site needs to work for retrieval bots, not just humans. Scrunch reveals how AI agents experience your site—what gets surfaced, ignored, and why. Get a FREE AI SITE AUDIT [11] to find content gaps and technical blockers.

articles.title: SEE HOW AI READS MY SITE →
CLIKDEO
articles.summary: ClikDeo is a free, web-based video editing platform for content creators that doesn't leave a watermark. Use it to create videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts. It allows you to trim videos, merge clips, and add custom transitions.

articles.title: FROM RESEARCH TO REVENUE: 5 AEO ACTIONS TO TAKE NOW (WEBINAR)
articles.summary: AirOps is hosting a webinar on improving AI search visibility and citation performance. It explains why ranking well is no longer enough since AI systems often retrieve content but do not cite it. The session breaks down how prompts flow into retrieval and final answers and why many pages are surfaced but not selected. It will take place on June 25 at 3 PM EST.

articles.title: HOW AI IS MERGING PAID AND ORGANIC VISIBILITY
articles.summary: The same AI system running Google's paid auctions evaluates organic content and powers AI Overviews, which means the brand-training investment that improves organic visibility also improves paid performance. The clearest application is treating paid and organic as a single loop. Run PMax or AI Max to find which cohort-intent-profit combinations actually convert, then build organic pages designed precisely for those audiences so user behavior sends the engine the same signal the paid campaign declared explicitly. CPC drops when Gemini trusts a brand because the engine stops second-guessing creative, and organic rankings improve because behavioral signals align with what paid already declared.

articles.title: THE COST OF LINK INSERTIONS, BASED ON ~420K SITES
articles.summary: Link insertions look like a low-cost link-building tactic, but the market is dominated by low-quality sites. The average insertion costs $179 (versus $461 for a guest post), yet 97.5% of sites selling insertions fall into the low quality tier and only 0.34% of sites qualify as high quality. Don't assume lower cost equals better value because most paid insertion opportunities sit on sites with little traffic or authority. Use a targeted outreach strategy to find and pitch relevant, authoritative posts that would genuinely benefit from a link to your content.

articles.title: AD REVENUE STANDS TO GROW BY 8.9% THIS YEAR – AND AI MIGHT BE WHY
articles.summary: Generative search ads are projected to reach $5.1 billion globally in 2026 and hit $100 billion by 2030, making it the fastest ad channel ever to reach that threshold.

articles.title: META'S NEW ‘AI MODE' ON FACEBOOK PULLS FROM PUBLIC INFO ACROSS ITS PLATFORMS
articles.summary: Facebook's AI Mode synthesizes plain-language answers from public posts across Groups and Reels rather than returning search results.

articles.title: WHY OATLY'S MARKETING WENT FROM WORDY BILLBOARDS TO BEVERAGE EVENTS
articles.summary: Oatly's team of ex-baristas learned about drink trends to feed an annual lookbook of flavor and texture predictions modeled on fashion industry trend reports.
